ddls:
CREATE TABLE "student_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the student group (e.g., Asian, Black, Hispanic, White) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the student group */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* The number of students in the group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the group was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date the group information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the group (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., English Reading Performance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "metric_weight" REAL /* The weight or importance of the metric in overall performance assessment */,
  "target_value" REAL /* The target value for the metric */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* The unit in which the metric is measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "english_learner_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the progress record */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student group */,
  "progress_level" TEXT /* Level of progress for English learners */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date the progress was recorded */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* The number of students in the group who are English learners */,
  "total_hours_of_instruction" INTEGER /* Total hours of English instruction provided */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link to the intervention_records table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_english_learner_progress_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES student_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_english_learner_progress_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES intervention_records ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absenteeism_records" (
  "absenteeism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the absenteeism record */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student group */,
  "absenteeism_rate" REAL /* Rate of chronic absenteeism */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the record was created */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* The number of students in the group */,
  "total_days_absent" INTEGER /* Total number of days absent */,
  "reasons_for_absence" TEXT /* Common reasons for absenteeism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("absenteeism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absenteeism_records_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES student_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the graduation indicator */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student group */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of federal graduation indicator */,
  "indicator_date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was recorded */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* The number of students in the group */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* The percentage of students who graduated */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* The percentage of students who dropped out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_indicators_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES student_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance record */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student group */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "performance_level" TEXT /* Level of performance */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date the performance was recorded */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* The number of students in the group */,
  "average_score" REAL /* The average score in the performance metric */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* The standard deviation of the performance scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES student_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., teacher, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES student_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_records" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the intervention record */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student group */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention */,
  "number_of_students_involved" INTEGER /* The number of students involved in the intervention */,
  "cost" REAL /* The cost of the intervention */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* The source of funding for the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_records_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES student_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_changes" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the policy change */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy change */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was implemented */,
  "responsible_department" TEXT /* The department responsible for the policy change */,
  "expected_outcome" TEXT /* The expected outcome of the policy change */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* The date the policy change will be evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)
